latest.verdict: To address the missing tests, create a comprehensive list of all agent modules and their corresponding test files. Prioritize writing new tests for base.py, iuppiter.py, luna.py, mars.py, mercurius.py before rewriting any code. This will ensure we're building on a solid foundation and catch critical gaps in our testing framework. Fix umbris-core/tests/test_introspection.py:284 to ensure the integrity of our introspection functionality. Address the TODO at umbris-core/tests/test_introspection.py:101 with a temporary workaround and document the fix. Once the test suite is comprehensive, we can focus on rewriting code and improving performance.
